The '''Daya''' was the name for the central grand plaza of the large [[Elrood Bazaar]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]]. The location served as a place where customers could mingle and move through the shops. The area was surrounded by a ring of permanent buildings known as the [[Perma (buildings)|Perma]].
